overview.title: Foundations before APIs
overview.description: This layer organizes the portal before entering Open Orders, Open Catalog, REST API or GraphQL API.

items.title: Business integrations
items.text: Open Orders, Open Catalog and Inventory focus on business outcomes.

items.title: Channels and protocols
items.text: REST API, GraphQL API and Webhook define how data is exchanged.

items.title: Shared foundations
items.text: Authentication, environments, errors and standards are reused everywhere.

doc-map.title: Documentation map
doc-map.description: Structure to reduce ambiguity and speed up onboarding.

items.title: Pick integration
items.text: Open Orders, Open Catalog or Inventory by business goal.

items.title: Choose channel
items.text: REST, GraphQL and/or Webhook depending on consumption model.

items.title: Run recipes
items.text: Follow scenario-based guides and validate in sandbox.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Single pattern for all platform integrations.

sections.content: Use integration credentials to obtain a token and send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected requests.

environments.title: Environments and credentials
environments.description: Use sandbox for tests, then promote to production.

errors.title: Error model
errors.description: Cross-cutting pattern for observability and retries.

rows.description: Internal failure; apply retry with backoff.

recipes-overview.title: How to use recipes
recipes-overview.description: Recipes connect business + channel + endpoint in a simple flow.

sections.content: Each recipe guides end-to-end context, prerequisites, calls, validation and error handling.

recipe-orders.title: Recipe: orders flow
recipe-orders.description: Practical path for Open Orders with events and acknowledgments.

items.title: Receive order
items.text: Use webhook or polling depending on setup.

items.title: Acknowledge order
items.text: Reply in the expected acknowledgement window.

items.title: Update status
items.text: Publish preparation, picking and completion events.

recipe-catalog.title: Recipe: catalog and inventory
recipe-catalog.description: Practical flow for products, pricing and availability sync.

items.title: Incremental sync
items.text: Update price and stock in defined intervals.

items.title: Handle rejections
items.text: Fix validation errors and SKU inconsistencies.
